workflow_mermaid:
flowchart TD
    A[Query] --> B[Hybrid Retrieval]
    B --> C[Retrieval Grader]
    C -->|High quality| D[Context Expansion]
    C -->|Low quality, retries left| E[Query Correction]
    E --> B
    C -->|Low quality, retries exhausted| F[Web Fallback]
    F --> D
    D --> G[Answer Generation]
    G --> H[Judge Verification]
    H -->|Grounded| I[Final Response]
    H -->|Ungrounded, one retry| F

route_summary_preview.query: What evidence links diabetes with insulin resistance in this corpus?
route_summary_preview.corrected_query: What evidence links diabetes with insulin resistance in this corpus?
route_summary_preview.trace: retrieve_hybrid -> grade_retrieval -> context_expansion -> answer_generation -> verify_answer -> finalize

route_summary_preview.query: Summarize findings about hypertension risk factors.
route_summary_preview.corrected_query: Summarize findings about hypertension risk factors.
route_summary_preview.trace: retrieve_hybrid -> grade_retrieval -> context_expansion -> answer_generation -> verify_answer -> finalize

route_summary_preview.query: What do retrieved abstracts report about KRAS in pancreatic cancer?
route_summary_preview.corrected_query: What do retrieved abstracts report on the prevalence of KRAS mutations in pancreatic cancer patients, the signaling pathways (such as MAPK/ERK) directly affected by these mutations, and the clinical implications—including treatment response, prognosis, and therapeutic strategies—associated with KRAS mutations in pancreatic cancer?
route_summary_preview.trace: retrieve_hybrid -> grade_retrieval -> query_correction -> retrieve_hybrid -> grade_retrieval -> query_correction -> retrieve_hybrid -> grade_retrieval -> web_fallback -> context_expansion -> answer_generation -> verify_answer -> web_fallback -> context_expansion -> answer_generation -> verify_answer -> finalize
